news.title: Todd Blanche, author of DOJ crypto enforcement memo, is now interim AG
news.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump named Todd Blanche, his former personal attorney and deputy attorney general, as the interim top prosecutor.

news.title: Crypto market structure bill release pushed back as industries view revised stablecoin yield compromise this week
news.summary: Crypto and banking industry representatives are viewing revised stablecoin yield compromise language this week.

news.title: Here’s why bitcoin’s drop below $68,000 raises the risk of a crash under $60,000
news.summary: The negative gamma zone below $68,000 can trigger a self-reinforcing sell-off, leading to an ever larger slump.
